'''Lightflash Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. Equipped with [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], they participated in the [[Battle of Adumar]] that pitted a combination of [[Adumar/Legends|Adumari]] and New Republic forces against those of the [[Imperial Remnant]]. The squadron took heavy losses during the engagement.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
